CONTENT.Early life: Born in Badalona, Barcelona, Catalonia, Hernández started his footballing career at Girona.
CONTENT.Personal life: Hernández is the older brother of Unax Hernández. He is the son of Josep Hernández and Raquel Lorenzo.
CONTENT.Style of play: Hernández has been described as "handles himself very well when he has to move to the left side, with very quick and different changes of pace".
CONTENT.External links: Unai Hernández at BDFutbolUnai Hernández at LaPreferente.com (in Spanish)

SUMMARY: Unai Hernández Lorenzo (born 14 December 2004) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Barcelona Atlètic.
